title: SV: default value for function argument as null
body:
I get:

```log
ivl_uvm_i445.sv:4: Error: Class/null r-value not allowed in this context.
ivl_uvm_i445.sv:4: error: Unable to evaluate null as a port default expression.
2 error(s) during elaboration.

```

Code:

```verilog
package t_pkg;

  virtual class uvm_component;
    function new (string name = "uvm_component", uvm_component parent = null);
    endfunction : new 
  endclass


endpackage : t_pkg

module m;

  import t_pkg::*;

  initial begin
    $display ("%m From code block");
  end
endmodule 


```
code_blocks:
ivl_uvm_i445.sv:4: Error: Class/null r-value not allowed in this context.
ivl_uvm_i445.sv:4: error: Unable to evaluate null as a port default expression.
2 error(s) during elaboration.
